/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/wifi_scanner.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/wifi_scanner.dir/src/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wifi_scanner.dir/src/core/WifiScanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wifi_scanner.dir/src/adapter/SystemIWLAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wifi_scanner.dir/src/utils/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wifi_scanner.dir/src/config/ConfigLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wifi_scanner.dir/src/adapter/Nl80211Adapter.cpp.o -o wifi_scanner  -lnl-genl-3 -lnl-3
